issue_draft.title: Rate Limiting for Login Endpoint
issue_draft.problem_description: The current implementation of the login endpoint does not include rate limiting, which can lead to abuse and denial-of-service attacks. Implementing rate limiting will prevent excessive login attempts from being made within a short period.
issue_draft.evidence: No rate limiting is currently implemented in the login endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: The login endpoint will return a 429 Too Many Requests error after 5 consecutive failed login attempts within a 1-minute window.
The login endpoint will limit the number of login attempts to 10 per hour.
issue_draft.instruction: Add rate limiting to login endpoint
